case red
α : Type u_1
c₀ : RBColor
n₀ : Nat
c : RBColor
n : Nat
t : RBNode α
path : Path α
hp : Path.Balanced c₀ n₀ path c n
ht : DelProp red t n
hc : c = black → red ≠ red
⊢ ∃ n,
    (match path, t, red with
        | root, t, x => t.setBlack
        | left c parent y b, a, red => parent.del (node red a y b) c
        | right c a y parent, b, red => parent.del (node red a y b) c
        | left c parent y b, a, black => parent.del (a.balLeft y b) c
        | right c a y parent, b, black => parent.del (a.balRight y b) c).Balanced
      black n
